positions.label: La-5 / Yak fighter division at Kursk
Fighter cover over the Belgorod offensive

summary: The 205th Fighter Aviation Division was one of the 5th Fighter Aviation Corps' divisions at Kursk, flying Lavochkin and Yakovlev fighters over the southern face of the salient.
notes: Kursk showcase (Tier-2 drill-down): renders when its corps or the division itself is selected.
